may_2025_-_present.Work done: Worked on Draw Match Kingdom, a casual mobile game. Refactored core systems to improve maintainability and scalability. Built and maintained live ops features and a debug menu toolset for QA and production teams. Extended a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for automated Unity builds, including branch selection, S3 upload, Slack notifications, feature tagging, and webhook fixes. Also contributed to server-side work on Google Cloud, including API integration and payment flow migration from WebSockets to HTTP.

april_2021_-_december_2024.Work done: Worked on several games including Agents of Influence, Rights Arcade, Kings Kombat, Kings Defence, and Kings Royale. Contributed across all stages of development, from early concepts to final releases. Led multiplayer systems, game-to-web data syncing, and flexible designs for new projects. Built tools to support level creation and smoother workflows for future developers.

january_2021_-_april_2021.Work done: Developed three games, including a word search competition game, a dungeon racing game with procedural generation, and a racing game with obstacle dodging and boost pads. Worked independently on coding, visuals, and audio integration. Designed a local pseudo-multiplayer system that recorded and replayed data, and created a basic UI package for menus and game over screens.

may_2017_-_may_2018.Work done: Worked on client-facing projects including Rush Kart Racing 3D, quiz-based learning games, and several hypercasual titles. Responsibilities included bug fixing, UI updates, shop integration, and level design. Used mesh compression, object pooling, PUN2, and reusable packages for Google Play Games integration, leaderboards, and basic UI. Also gained experience with WebGL.

decemeber_2016_-_february_2017.Work done: Contributed to Tale of Prisso, a puzzle game focused on refracting and reflecting light. Implemented light mechanics and a gravity well effect, and assisted with animation integration, player movement, and code optimization in Unity.
